mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, host, port, protocol, username, password, region, status, bound_account_id, bound_at, last_sample_check_at, source, ownership, remark, created_at, updated_at, created_by, deleted_at

sql.where:
deleted_at IS NULL AND region IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(region) != '' AND protocol = #{q.protocol} AND source LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.source}, '%')
AND ( TRIM(region) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') OR host LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') OR username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') OR source LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') OR CONCAT(host, ':', port) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') )

sql.if:
HAVING
SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 AND SUM(CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
NOT ( SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 AND SUM(CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 ) AND ((SUM(CASE WHEN status IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0) / COUNT(*)) < 20
NOT ( SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 AND SUM(CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 ) AND NOT (((SUM(CASE WHEN status IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0) / COUNT(*)) < 20) AND ((SUM(CASE WHEN status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0) / COUNT(*)) > 50
NOT ( ( SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 AND SUM(CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 ) OR ((SUM(CASE WHEN status IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0) / COUNT(*)) < 20 OR ((SUM(CASE WHEN status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0) / COUNT(*)) > 50 )
1 = 1

mapper.sql:
SELECT TRIM(region) AS region, COUNT(*) AS total_ip_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS in_use_ip_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS idle_ip_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS unavailable_ip_count FROM ip_proxy
GROUP BY TRIM(region)
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM ip_proxy
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{q.pageSize} OFFSET #{q.offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_ip_count, CAST(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS SIGNED) AS in_use_ip_count, CAST(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS SIGNED) AS idle_ip_count, CAST(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS SIGNED) AS unavailable_ip_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN region IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(region) != '' THEN TRIM(region) ELSE NULL END) AS covered_region_count FROM ip_proxy WHERE deleted_at IS NULL

ORDER BY
in_use_ip_count idle_ip_count unavailable_ip_count
((idle_ip_count + in_use_ip_count) * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_ip_count, 0))
(unavailable_ip_count * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_ip_count, 0))
total_ip_count
ASC DESC , region ASC LIMIT #{q.pageSize} OFFSET #{q.offset}

SELECT id, CONCAT(host, ':', port) AS proxy_address, protocol, region, status, bound_account_id, source, ownership, last_sample_check_at, created_at, bound_at FROM ip_proxy
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{q.pageSize} OFFSET #{q.offset}

SELECT region FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(region) AS region FROM ip_proxy WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND region IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(region) != '' ) r ORDER BY CASE WHEN r.region = #{mixedRegion} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, r.region ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ip_proxy (host, port, protocol, username, password, region, status, source, ownership, remark, created_at, updated_at, created_by) VALUES (#{host}, #{port}, #{protocol}, #{username}, #{password}, #{region}, #{status}, #{source}, #{ownership}, #{remark}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{createdBy})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ip_proxy WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1

select.if: SELECT DISTINCT bound_account_id FROM ip_proxy WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND status = #{usingStatus} AND bound_account_id IS NOT NULL AND id IN #{id}
